parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Pushy destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise pushy:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead POST a native Pushy push payload directly to api.pushy.me, bypassing Apprise.
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Pushy destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to Pushy API (no Apprise)

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Pushy apikey

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Pushy targets
